import * as React from 'react'; import { DehydratedState, OmitKeyof, HydrateOptions, QueryClient } from '@tanstack/query-core'; interface HydrationBoundaryProps { state: DehydratedState | null | undefined; options?: OmitKeyof<HydrateOptions, 'defaultOptions'> & { defaultOptions?: OmitKeyof<Exclude<HydrateOptions['defaultOptions'], undefined>, 'mutations'>; }; children?: React.ReactNode; queryClient?: QueryClient; } declare const HydrationBoundary: ({ children, options, state, queryClient, }: HydrationBoundaryProps) => React.ReactElement; export { HydrationBoundary, type HydrationBoundaryProps };
